subcodes.first_line: O worshipper of truth! People worship their idle fancies, immerse themselves in imitation and are entirely alienated from the hidden secrets of God.
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای حقیقت پرست جمیع خلق پرستش اوهام مینمایند و در تقالید آباء و اجداد مستغرقند
subcodes.subjects: @material and spiritual existence; two books, @spiritual transformation, @exhortations and counsels, @transcending the material condition, @blind imitation [taqlid]
